description: Single-user to-do workspace with nested sub-tasks, Today/Upcoming/All filters, and a focus mode with a 25-minute Pomodoro timer. Plus CI/release plumbing.

userStories.title: Tasks schema in Supabase
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a tasks table so the app has somewhere to persist data.
acceptanceCriteria: SQL migration at web/supabase/migrations/001_tasks.sql with columns: id uuid PK, title text not null, notes text, due_date timestamptz, status text default 'open' check (status in ('open','done')), parent_id uuid null references tasks(id) on delete cascade, created_at timestamptz default now()
Indexes on parent_id and due_date
supabase db push applies cleanly against the linked project
pnpm typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Shipped 2026-04-20: web/supabase/migrations/001_tasks.sql with the exact schema + indexes from agent-docs/database.md. Minimal web/ scaffold (package.json, strict tsconfig, src/lib/types.ts with Task type mirroring the schema) so pnpm typecheck gates cleanly. Added *.tsbuildinfo to .gitignore. Not verified: supabase db push against a linked project (no remote creds in local env).

userStories.title: Add a task
userStories.description: As a user, I want to add a top-level task with a title, optional notes, and an optional due date, so I can start capturing work.
acceptanceCriteria: An 'Add task' form is visible on the Today view
Fields: title (required), notes (optional), due_date (optional date picker)
Submit calls a server action that inserts into Supabase
After submit, the row appears in the task list without a full page reload (use revalidatePath)
Empty title is rejected client-side and server-side
pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test passes
userStories.notes: Shipped 2026-04-20: built the app shell (layout, Sidebar, Header, main canvas) per design/DESIGN.md before the feature, then added an AddTaskForm (useActionState, required title, optional notes + due_date) wired to a server action at web/src/app/actions.ts that inserts via @supabase/ssr and calls revalidatePath('/'). Empty title rejected both client (required attr) and server (trim check). TaskList is an async server component listing top-level tasks (parent_id is null). Quality gate green: 7 vitest tests pass across the nextjs contract test, action unit tests, and form render test. Not verified: live DB round-trip (no NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_* creds locally).

userStories.title: Sub-tasks
userStories.description: As a user, I want to attach sub-tasks to a parent task so I can break work down.
acceptanceCriteria: Each task row has a '+ subtask' button
Clicking it reveals an inline input; submitting creates a child task with parent_id set
Sub-tasks render nested under their parent (one level deep is enough)
Deleting a parent cascades to children (rely on the FK constraint)
pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test passes
userStories.notes: Shipped 2026-04-20: extended createTask to accept a hidden parent_id field (null by default, string uuid when set) so the same action handles both top-level and sub-task inserts. Added AddSubtaskForm client component with a '+ subtask' trigger that reveals an inline required title input; auto-collapses on success, shows role=alert on error. Extracted TaskCard server component; TaskList now fetches all rows, groups children by parent_id into a Map, and passes subtasks as a prop. Sub-tasks render on a surface-container-highest tonal panel (no borders). Parent-delete cascade already covered by the ON DELETE CASCADE in migration 001. Quality gate green: 11 vitest tests pass (6 action incl. new parent_id test + 1 contract + 1 AddTaskForm + 3 AddSubtaskForm).

userStories.title: Left-nav filters
userStories.description: As a user, I want to switch between Today / Upcoming / All so I can focus on what's relevant.
acceptanceCriteria: Left-nav has three items: Today, Upcoming, All
Selection is reflected in the URL as ?filter=today|upcoming|all (default: today)
Today: tasks where due_date::date = current_date
Upcoming: tasks where due_date::date > current_date
All: every task, no date filter
Active filter is visually highlighted
pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test passes

userStories.title: Focus mode with Pomodoro
userStories.description: As a user, I want to click a task and enter a focused view with a 25-minute timer so I can actually do the work.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a task title routes to /focus/[id]
Focus view shows only the task title, notes, and a large 25:00 timer
Controls: Start, Pause, Reset
Timer ticks down every second; reaching 00:00 shows 'Done — take a break' (no sound)
Timer state is client-side only (no persistence)
ESC or a visible 'Back' button exits to the previous view
pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test passes

userStories.title: CI and release workflows
userStories.description: As a developer, I want GitHub Actions workflows so the quality gate runs automatically and releases are reproducible.
acceptanceCriteria: .github/workflows/ci.yml runs on push to any branch and on PRs to main: ubuntu-latest, Node 20, pnpm via corepack; steps: checkout, pnpm install --frozen-lockfile in web/, pnpm -C web typecheck, pnpm -C web lint, pnpm -C web test
CI workflow skips gracefully if web/package.json doesn't exist yet

.github/workflows/release.yml runs on push of a tag matching v*: runs the same gate first, then uses softprops/action-gh-release@v2 (or equivalent) to create a GitHub Release with auto-generated notes
Both workflows pass on a trivial no-op PR against main
pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test passes
